plan_metrics.plan_content:
The plan is written to `/Users/timpietrusky/.claude/plans/logical-dreaming-dijkstra.md`. Here's the summary:

---

## Plan: Optimize `src/pipeline.ts`

Only **one file changes**: `src/pipeline.ts`. Each function gets a targeted algorithmic fix:

| # | Function | Current | Optimized | Key Change |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `groupByCategory` | O(n²) | O(n) | `Map<category, group>` replaces `Array.find()` + `reduce()` |
| 2 | `findDuplicates` | O(n²) | O(n) | Single-pass `Map<key, group>` replaces nested `for i/j` loops |
| 3 | `calculateRunningBalance` | O(n² log n) | O(n log n) | Filter once → sort once → one forward pass; no re-scan per position |
| 4 | `topSpenders` | O(n·u + u²) | O(n + u log u) | Single-pass `Map` for aggregation; `Array.sort()` replaces bubble sort |
| 5 | `searchTransactions` | O(n²) | O(n) | Compile `RegExp` once before the loop; `Array.filter` replaces manual dedup |
| 6 | `processAll` | — | — | No change; inherits all speedups above |

**Correctness guarantees:**
- `findDuplicates` key format `"${userId}|${amount}|${date}"` is preserved exactly (test asserts `"alice|50|2025-01-15"`)
- `calculateRunningBalance` rounding (`Math.round(x * 100) / 100`) applied per-entry, mathematically identical to the original's full-sum-then-round
- `topSpenders` rounding preserved; `slice(0, n)` handles `n > unique users` case

**Verification:** `npx vitest run` — both `pipeline.test.ts` (correctness) and `performance.test.ts` (timing) must pass.
